channel.title: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404
channel.description:
**Description**
I'm trying to set up a custom post type with some taxonomies.
My state settings are
```js { "name": "@frontity/wp-source", "state": { "source": { "api": "https://www.defining-perspective.com/wp-json", "postTypes": [ { "type": "avada_portfolio", "endpoint": "avada_portfolio", "archive": "/portfolio" } ], "taxonomies": [ { "taxonomy": "portfolio_category", "endpoint": "portfolio_category", "postTypeEndpoint": "avada_portfolio" } ] } } } ```
and I've tried these menus
```js "menu": [ [ "Home", "/" ], [ "Portfolio", "/portfolio/" ], [ "Design", "/portfolio_category/design/" ] ], ```
What works? - the `/portfolio/` page lists the items under my custom post type as expected - I can open items from that list as expected
What does not work? - the `/portfolio_category/design/` page errors on the frontend, but it actually fetches the data as expected
![Képernyőfotó 2020-09-07 - 23.30.27|690x228](upload://72cGg89hCbzMbOcep0cSO4vZOKk.png)
An example URL that shows these contents is at https://www.defining-perspective.com/hu/portfolio_category/design/
The JSON API can be accessed at https://www.defining-perspective.com/wp-json
What do I screw up?
Nota bene, I don't have a component to render the custom post type yet.
**Frontity info**
```zsh ➜ npx frontity info
## System: - OS: macOS 10.15.6 - CPU: (8) x64 Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-8569U CPU @ 2.80GHz - Memory: 1.06 GB / 16.00 GB - Shell: 5.7.1 - /bin/zsh ## Binaries: - Node: 12.18.1 - /usr/local/opt/node@12/bin/node - npm: 6.14.5 - /usr/local/opt/node@12/bin/npm ## Browsers: - Chrome: 85.0.4183.83 - Edge: Not Found - Firefox: 80.0.1 - Safari: 13.1.2 ## npmPackages: - @frontity/core: ^1.8.0 => 1.8.0 - @frontity/html2react: ^1.3.5 => 1.3.5 - @frontity/mars-theme: ./packages/mars-theme => 1.4.3 - @frontity/tiny-router: ^1.2.1 => 1.2.1 - @frontity/wp-source: ^1.8.1 => 1.8.1 - frontity: ^1.11.0 => 1.11.0 ## npmGlobalPackages: - frontity: Not Found - npx: Not Found
System info copied in the clipboard! You can now paste it in the Frontity Community or GitHub issue. ```
**Browser stacktrace**
``` ServerError: You have tried to access content at route: /portfolio_category/design/ but it does not exist ServerError server-error.ts:8 _ref3 taxonomy.ts:139 asyncGeneratorStep taxonomy.ts:4 _next taxonomy.ts:4 batch scheduler.js:10 batchedUpdates$1 React batch scheduler.js:10 batched scheduler.js:25 apply scheduler.js:42 asyncGeneratorStep taxonomy.ts:4 _next taxonomy.ts:4 batch scheduler.js:10 batchedUpdates$1 React batch scheduler.js:10 batched scheduler.js:25 apply scheduler.js:42 asyncGeneratorStep taxonomy.ts:4 _next taxonomy.ts:4 batch scheduler.js:10 batchedUpdates$1 React batch scheduler.js:10 batched scheduler.js:25 apply scheduler.js:42 asyncGeneratorStep taxonomy.ts:4 _next taxonomy.ts:4 batch scheduler.js:10 batchedUpdates$1 React batch scheduler.js:10 batched scheduler.js:25 apply scheduler.js:42 asyncGeneratorStep taxonomy.ts:4 _next taxonomy.ts:4 _asyncToGenerator taxonomy.ts:4 _asyncToGenerator taxonomy.ts:4 taxonomyHandler taxonomy.ts:65 fetch actions.ts:79 asyncGeneratorStep actions.ts:9 _next actions.ts:9 _asyncToGenerator actions.ts:9 _asyncToGenerator actions.ts:9 react_devtools_backend.js:2273:24 ```
**Terminal output**
There are no errors shown in the terminal
```zsh ➜ npx frontity dev
SERVER STARTED -- Listening @ http://localhost:3000 - mode: development - target: module - public-path: /static/
webpack built client e77955bfdcfea1720b6b in 2970ms ℹ ｢wdm｣: Child client: Asset Size Chunks Chunk Names dpp-frontend.module.js 4.82 MiB dpp-frontend [emitted] dpp-frontend list.module.js 46.9 KiB list [emitted] list + 1 hidden asset Child server: Asset Size Chunks Chunk Names server.js 7.3 MiB main [emitted] main ℹ ｢wdm｣: Compiled successfully. Importing `URL` from Frontity has been deprecated. Please use `new URL()` instead. Visit https://community.frontity.org for help! 🙂 ```

item.title: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404
item.dc:creator: viktor.nagy
item.description:
The problem was the setting of Polylang. Setting it to “language is set from content”, removed the language prefix from the various links, and frontity started to work as expected.

I’m currently setting it up as multiple sites for each language following the example at https://codesandbox.io/s/frontity-two-sites-multilingual-vt3f6?file=/frontity.settings.js

Read full topic
item.source: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404

item.title: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404
item.dc:creator: viktor.nagy
item.description:
@juanma Could this be the consequence of running a multi-language WordPress in the backend?

Looking at ´frontitiy.state.source.data´, I see that the keys start with the language ´tag´, like: ´/hu/portfolio_category/design/´.

Read full topic
item.source: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404

item.title: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404
item.dc:creator: viktor.nagy
item.description:
Dear @juanma,

yes I did. It helped me understanding the postTypes[].archive property, and I’ve managed to get that working. I’ve watched both the video and went through the example source code. Actually, I can’t figure out what I made differently.

Read full topic
item.source: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404

item.title: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @viktor.nagy

Welcome to the Community!

Heve you checked this Frontity Talk where we explain from scratch how to use Custom Post Types with Frontity?

Frontity – 25 Aug 20

Frontity Talks: Custom Post Types

In this episode of Frontity Talks we show you how to use Custom Post Types with headless WordPress in your React-based Frontity project.

Here you have the code of the demo we explain in the video

GitHub

frontity-demos/frontity-examples

Contribute to frontity-demos/frontity-examples development by creating an account on GitHub.

Hope this helps

Read full topic
item.source: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404

item.title: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404
item.dc:creator: viktor.nagy
item.description:
Description

I’m trying to set up a custom post type with some taxonomies.

My state settings are

{
      "name": "@frontity/wp-source",
      "state": {
        "source": {
          "api": "https://www.defining-perspective.com/wp-json",
          "postTypes": [
            {
              "type": "avada_portfolio",
              "endpoint": "avada_portfolio",
              "archive": "/portfolio"
            }
          ],
          "taxonomies": [
            {
              "taxonomy": "portfolio_category",
              "endpoint": "portfolio_category",
              "postTypeEndpoint": "avada_portfolio"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }

and I’ve tried these menus

"menu": [
            [
              "Home",
              "/"
            ],
            [
              "Portfolio",
              "/portfolio/"
            ],
            [
              "Design",
              "/portfolio_category/design/"
            ]
          ],

What works?

  • the /portfolio/ page lists the items under my custom post type as expected
  • I can open items from that list as expected

What does not work?

  • the /portfolio_category/design/ page errors on the frontend, but it actually fetches the data as expected

An example URL that shows these contents is at https://www.defining-perspective.com/hu/portfolio_category/design/

The JSON API can be accessed at https://www.defining-perspective.com/wp-json

What do I screw up?

Nota bene, I don’t have a component to render the custom post type yet.

Frontity info

➜ npx frontity info

## System:
 - OS: macOS 10.15.6
 - CPU: (8) x64 Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-8569U CPU @ 2.80GHz
 - Memory: 1.06 GB / 16.00 GB
 - Shell: 5.7.1 - /bin/zsh
## Binaries:
 - Node: 12.18.1 - /usr/local/opt/node@12/bin/node
 - npm: 6.14.5 - /usr/local/opt/node@12/bin/npm
## Browsers:
 - Chrome: 85.0.4183.83
 - Edge: Not Found
 - Firefox: 80.0.1
 - Safari: 13.1.2
## npmPackages:
 - @frontity/core: ^1.8.0 => 1.8.0 
 - @frontity/html2react: ^1.3.5 => 1.3.5 
 - @frontity/mars-theme: ./packages/mars-theme => 1.4.3 
 - @frontity/tiny-router: ^1.2.1 => 1.2.1 
 - @frontity/wp-source: ^1.8.1 => 1.8.1 
 - frontity: ^1.11.0 => 1.11.0 
## npmGlobalPackages:
 - frontity: Not Found
 - npx: Not Found

  
  System info copied in the clipboard!
  You can now paste it in the Frontity Community or GitHub issue.

Browser stacktrace

ServerError: You have tried to access content at route: /portfolio_category/design/ but it does not exist
    ServerError server-error.ts:8
    _ref3 taxonomy.ts:139
    asyncGeneratorStep taxonomy.ts:4
    _next taxonomy.ts:4
    batch scheduler.js:10
    batchedUpdates$1 React
    batch scheduler.js:10
    batched scheduler.js:25
    apply scheduler.js:42
    asyncGeneratorStep taxonomy.ts:4
    _next taxonomy.ts:4
    batch scheduler.js:10
    batchedUpdates$1 React
    batch scheduler.js:10
    batched scheduler.js:25
    apply scheduler.js:42
    asyncGeneratorStep taxonomy.ts:4
    _next taxonomy.ts:4
    batch scheduler.js:10
    batchedUpdates$1 React
    batch scheduler.js:10
    batched scheduler.js:25
    apply scheduler.js:42
    asyncGeneratorStep taxonomy.ts:4
    _next taxonomy.ts:4
    batch scheduler.js:10
    batchedUpdates$1 React
    batch scheduler.js:10
    batched scheduler.js:25
    apply scheduler.js:42
    asyncGeneratorStep taxonomy.ts:4
    _next taxonomy.ts:4
    _asyncToGenerator taxonomy.ts:4
    _asyncToGenerator taxonomy.ts:4
    taxonomyHandler taxonomy.ts:65
    fetch actions.ts:79
    asyncGeneratorStep actions.ts:9
    _next actions.ts:9
    _asyncToGenerator actions.ts:9
    _asyncToGenerator actions.ts:9
react_devtools_backend.js:2273:24

Terminal output

There are no errors shown in the terminal

➜ npx frontity dev 


SERVER STARTED -- Listening @ http://localhost:3000
  - mode: development
  - target: module
  - public-path: /static/


webpack built client e77955bfdcfea1720b6b in 2970ms
ℹ ｢wdm｣: Child client:
                     Asset      Size        Chunks             Chunk Names
    dpp-frontend.module.js  4.82 MiB  dpp-frontend  [emitted]  dpp-frontend
            list.module.js  46.9 KiB          list  [emitted]  list
     + 1 hidden asset
Child server:
        Asset     Size  Chunks             Chunk Names
    server.js  7.3 MiB    main  [emitted]  main
ℹ ｢wdm｣: Compiled successfully.
Importing `URL` from Frontity has been deprecated. Please use `new URL()` instead.
Visit https://community.frontity.org for help! 🙂

Read full topic
item.source: Custom post type fetches data with 200, but frontify returns 404
